title: Uppercase TRUE/FALSE strings cannot be converted to boolean values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bug_test(a BOOLEAN, b VARCHAR(10), c INT);
INSERT INTO bug_test (a, b, c) VALUES (TRUE, 'true', 1), (FALSE, 'false', 0), (NULL, 'TRUE', NULL), (NULL, 'FALSE', NULL);
INSERT INTO bug_test (a, b, c) VALUES (CAST('TRUE' AS BOOLEAN), '1', 1), (CAST('FALSE' AS BOOLEAN), '0', 0);
SELECT * FROM bug_test WHERE a IS NULL OR a = TRUE;
INSERT INTO bug_test (a, b, c) SELECT TRUE, 'test', 2 UNION ALL SELECT FALSE, 'example', 3;
key_bug_features: Uppercase TRUE/FALSE strings fail boolean conversion
